description.zh: 以非常轻的步行联系线串联桥头、民俗艺术馆、历史文化馆与旅游码头，表达街区内的文化解释关系。
description.en: A light walking connection linking the bridge entrance, folk art museum, historic culture museum, and tourist wharf as a heritage interpretation sequence.

description.zh: 优先选择桥头、历史文化馆与码头等较易识别的开敞节点，用于方向确认与语音提示。
description.en: Prioritizes recognizable open nodes such as the bridge entrance, history museum, and wharf for direction confirmation and audio prompts.

description.zh: 从桥头进入民俗与历史解释节点，再回到水岸码头，强调停留、观察与水陆关系。
description.en: Moves from the bridge into folk and historic interpretation nodes before returning to the waterfront wharf, emphasizing pause, observation, and land-water relation.
